Build-Depends: ableton-link-dev (>= 3.1.2+dfsg-2), cmake, debhelper-compat (= 13), elixir, erlang-dev, erlang-hex, fonts-hack, libasound2-dev, libaubio-dev, libboost-dev, libboost-filesystem-dev, libboost-thread-dev, libcatch2-dev, libconcurrentqueue-dev, libkissfft-dev, libqscintilla2-qt6-dev, libqt6opengl6-dev, libreproc-dev, librtmidi-dev, libspdlog-dev, pkgconf, qt6-base-dev, qt6-l10n-tools, qt6-svg-dev, qt6-tools-dev, qt6-tools-dev-tools, rake, rebar3, ruby, ruby-activesupport, ruby-all-dev, ruby-aubio, ruby-benchmark-ips, ruby-gettext, ruby-hamster, ruby-kramdown, ruby-minitest, ruby-mocha, ruby-multi-json, ruby-rubame, ruby-rugged, ruby-wavefile (>= 0.6.0-2), sc3-plugins-server
Package-List: sonic-pi deb sound optional arch=any sonic-pi-samples deb sound optional arch=all sonic-pi-server deb sound optional arch=any sonic-pi-server-doc deb doc optional arch=all
Testsuite-Triggers: aubio-tools, pipewire-bin, x11-apps, x11-utils, xdotool, xvfb
Uploaders: Hanno Zulla <kontakt@hanno.de>, Petter Reinholdtsen <pere@debian.org>, Valentin Vidic <vvidic@debian.org>
